programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E501 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Panther
programme.desc: Panther, the country's best RAW agent, undertakes a mission to catch the terrorists responsible for a series of bomb blasts in Mumbai and stop further attacks.

programme.title: Sakaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E726 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Pita
programme.desc: An honest motor mechanic lives happily with his wife, two sons and an adopted son. Unfortunate incidents ensue when one of his sons falls in love with a rich girl and decides to marry her.

programme.title: Simul Parul
programme.desc: Simul, Rajani's son, falls in love with Parul. However, Parul's father disapproves of their relationship because of his complicated history with Rajani.

programme.title: Bourani
programme.desc: A manipulative woman schemes to control her brother's wealth by orchestrating a marriage, but her plans begin to unravel when unexpected love enters the picture.

programme.title: Praner Swami
programme.desc: A businessman unsuccessfully looks for a prospective bride for his grandson, Moti. Later, Moti marries a woman, Moyna, of his choice, but she catches the eye of his friend, who wants her for himself.

programme.title: Rakto Nodir Dhara
programme.desc: Jaga, an international terrorist, avoids a prison term of 21 years by killing multiple people involved in the case. However, the sons of his victims return to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Kalankini Kankabati
programme.desc: Despite being married, a wealthy landlord falls in love with a beautiful courtesan. However, things take a turn after he kills his henchman upon learning about the latter's affair with the courtesan.

programme.title: Shrimati
programme.desc: Shrimati, a middle-class homemaker, decides to reclaim her life after almost losing her own identity to insecurities while chasing high-society status.

programme.title: Saheb Bibi Golam
programme.desc: A naive clerk observes the decadent lives of a fading zamindar family. He is drawn to the lonely wife, who yearns for love amid her husband's decline and their shared ruin.

programme.title: Sakaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E832 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E500 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Runway 34
programme.desc: Upon dealing with the rough climate in Cochin, two pilots make a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram. But trouble ensues when personnel from the AAIB probes the matter.

programme.title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
programme.desc: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay, a Rajput, is in love with Aditi, a Jat, and wants to get married. However, they realise that their parents would never allow it, so they come up with a cunning plan to get married.

programme.title: Desi Boyz
programme.desc: Two desi hunks become high-profile escorts when the economy hits the skids. Money soon pours in, but everything else in their lives starts falling apart.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz: Chapter 2 - Agni Pariksha
programme.desc: After the death of his friend's brother, Sameer and Nargis adopt his daughter Nandini. However, trouble ensues when she gets kidnapped.

programme.title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
programme.desc: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

programme.title: 420 IPC
programme.desc: A young defence lawyer locks horns with a seasoned prosecutor in a tricky fraud case trial. It is only a matter of time before it becomes evident that victory will not come easy for either of them.

programme.title: Kabir Singh
programme.desc: A genius but short-tempered surgeon falls madly in love with a girl. However, he begins to self-destruct after the girl's father marries her off to another.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: David and Monty, estranged half-brothers, train in mixed martial arts to earn a livelihood. However, things change when the two are forced to compete against each other in the final tournament.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.
